# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-a
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-a
        image: myregistry/microservice-a:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
  namespace: default
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-b
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice-b
        image: myregistry/microservice-b:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
